mapper.select: SELECT review_extra_id, appointment_id, reviewer_role, reviewer_user_id, overall_rating, review_content, create_time, update_time FROM review_extra WHERE review_extra_id = #{reviewExtraId}

SELECT review_extra_id, appointment_id, reviewer_role, review_target, reviewer_user_id, overall_rating, review_content, create_time, update_time FROM review_extra WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT review_extra_id, appointment_id, reviewer_role, review_target, reviewer_user_id, overall_rating, review_content, create_time, update_time FROM review_extra WHERE reviewer_user_id = #{reviewerUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC
